target: create unrestricted witness carrier interface needed before SelectedDomainDefect can be formalized

weakest_missing_object.name: SELECTED_DOMAIN_DEFECT_BASIS
weakest_missing_object.statement: exists defect_atoms : W_unrestricted -> Finset SelectedDomainDefect, forall w : W_unrestricted, terminal_unrestricted(w) -> selected_domain_defect(w) = (defect_atoms(w)).card and (selected_domain_defect(w) = 0 -> selected_domain_representable(w)) and (selected_domain_defect(w) != 0 -> exists d in defect_atoms(w), repairable_selected_domain_defect(w,d))

does_claim: bounded unrestricted witness carrier input target
names the carrier predicates needed for the selected-domain defect basis
